sourceEvidence.detail: openCatalog creates PopUp Context Class over channels 45 to 95 and displays the etus recorded frame.
CatalogPage_index drives visible page tabs, active/inactive button members, and goContext frame selection.
Purchase buttons send GETORDERINFO with the source code and current Habbo name.
Catalogue call IDs, prices, item definitions, colours, dimensions, behavior flags, names, and descriptions come from Roseau's catalogue tables.

adminEditing.sourceOfTruth: generated/runtime-data/release1_roseau_dcr0910-catalogue.json is generated from source evidence. public/habbo-config/catalogue/release1.json is the editable copy for future runtime override loading. Keep call IDs and definition IDs aligned with the active server database.

serverContract.productIdentity: Roseau resolves purchases by call_id and then creates inventory from definition_id. Custom colours and decoration data must be present in the code sent to the server.
serverContract.purchaseResult: Roseau sends ADDSTRIPITEM after successful purchase, then WALLETBALANCE updates credits.

furniManifest.note: Catalogue offers reference central furni definitions by definitionId. Room rendering, hand inventory, and catalogue preview code should use the same furni manifest instead of duplicating item metadata.

sourceSprites.memberText: 2 Credits each

Feel that 1970s vibe and add some colour to your life. Flamboyant Habbos who always seem to be the centre of attention need to take a closer look at this collection. Choose colours to reflect your mood, your feng shui aspirations or just your favourite shades. This room will be happy and filled with chat and laughter.

textMembers.text: 2 Credits each

Feel that 1970s vibe and add some colour to your life. Flamboyant Habbos who always seem to be the centre of attention need to take a closer look at this collection. Choose colours to reflect your mood, your feng shui aspirations or just your favourite shades. This room will be happy and filled with chat and laughter.

sourceSprites.memberText: For that 1970s ski-lodge effect – especially good by an open fire. The Lodge Collection is for Habbos who like plain and simple good quality, honesty and a bit of adventure. This collection makes your room a welcoming, pub-like comfort zone, conducive to both fire-side chats and wild nights in. 	Single Bed 	Double Bed  	Dining Table 	2 Credits 	3 Credits	3 Credits     		Occasional Table 	Bench	Stool  	2 Credits      	2 Credits     	1 Credit

sourceSprites.memberText: P U R Ac o l l e c t i o n

This collection breathes fresh, clean air and cool tranquillity. Use it tocreate a haven away from the hullabaloo of the public rooms or yourlife outside Habbo Hotel. The Simplicity Collection promotes relaxation,meditation and shared intimate moments.
Plain Single Bed  	Plain Double Bed	Single Bed (Aqua)	Double Bed (Aqua)2 Credits    	3 Credits	2 Credits	3 Credits

sourceSprites.memberText: Combining the cool, clean lines of the Mode collection with a softer, ironic feminist edge. Whether you're hip chick about town, stylish gay and proud to wear the irony of pink on your sleeve, or just into the healing feng shui of this powerful colour, the Candy Collection has an urban sharpness and a soft centre.	Armchair	Single Bed	Double Bed	  Two-seater sofa	3 Credits     	3 Credits	4 Credits	  4 Credits				Pink faux 				fur bear rug				4 Credits

sourceSprites.memberText: Have some fun with the cheerful bathroom collection. Whether for your personal comfort or a fun time with your friends, you'll love the accessories almost as much as the bubble bath – big enough for two!	Sink	Rubber Duck	Loo Seat	Loo Seat	Loo Seat	3 Credits	1 Credit	2 Credits	2 Credits	2 Credits		  Floor Tiles		  Size: 4x4		  2 Credits				      		Bubble Bath		  	6 Credits

sourceSprites.memberText: For the Habbo who needs no introduction. It's so chic, it says everything and nothing. This collection is perfect for the room of the gregarious, intelligent Habbo. It's a blank canvas to set the scene for imaginations to run wild. Think Art Deco, think Chanel, think whatever you like...	Chair	Bench	Coffee Table	2 Credits	2 Credits	2 Credits	Bookcase	Armchair	Sofa	3 Credits	3 Credits	4 Credits

sourceSprites.memberText: Adorn your walls with wondrous works of art, posters, plaquesand wall hangings. The Gallery is bursting with items to suit all tastes, from kitsch to cool, traditional to modern. All items only 2 Habbo Credits!
Choose a poster from the list
1. Carrot Plaque2. Fish Plaque3. Bear Plaque4. Duck Poster5. Ancestor Poster6. Queen Mum Poster7. Prince Charles Poster8. Abstract Poster9. Hammer Cabinet10. Habbo Colours Poster

next 10 >>

sourceSprites.memberText: Clean, chunky lines set this collection apart as a preserve of thedown-to-earth Habbo. It's beautiful in its simplicity, and welcomingto every Habbo. Male, female, old, young, straight, gay: all will feel athome with the uncluttered, though highly functional and comfortable,Area Collection.	Single Bed 	Double Bed   	Bookcase	Coffee Table	2 Credits     	3 Credits 	3 Credits  	2 Credits	Two-Seater Sofa	Armchair  	Dining Chair 	Occasional Table	3 Credits     	2 Credits     	2 Credits       	1 Credit

sourceSprites.memberText: Habbo Doors are actually space-age teleport boxes that beam you from one room to another! Buy a pair, put one in each room and you've got your own suite! You can either link two of your own rooms or link to a friend's (just give them one of the doors).From only 3 Credits a pair.
Telephone BoxMove to anotherroom in traditionalEnglish style5 Habbo Credits
PortalooFestival-chicinter-room transport4 Habbo Credits
WardrobeNarnia has nothing onthis teleport device! 3 Habbo Credits

sourceSprites.memberText: It's not just the furniture of your room that expresses your personality – a splash of colour on the walls or a sassy patterned carpet can make all the difference. Use our virtual room below to test out the combinations before you buy. 2 credits each.
